bridge.remaining_gap: Need actual Cerebras IPO pricing data above $22-25B with a first-day pop >=30% plus published underwriter allocation behavior to confirm the landing.

prediction_ref.short_label: 20260420-3 "Headless Everything" architecture standardizes (browserless, screen-less UI, API-only agent UI, MCP metadata, Agent Registry, Simon Willison, GUI-driving agents)

validation_rows.evidence_summary: Simon Willison's May 2 weblog "Sightings" continues the personal-AI-as-headless-tooling thread (a small JS app fetching iNaturalist data for personal homepage syndication, built on phone with Claude Code for web), and Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA wires MCP servers and identities into Defender's per-agent relationship-map as a single ops view.

reference_links.label: Microsoft Security Blog - Agent 365 GA May 1

bridge.narrative: Willison's May 2 Sightings entry is another personal-AI-prefers-headless data point alongside the May 1 Codex CLI changelog discussion, and Agent 365's relationship-map ties MCP servers and identities together as the operational substrate the headless-preferred metadata standard would point to. The thesis continues to accrete supporting examples without yet seeing a published metadata spec.
bridge.remaining_gap: Need an explicit headless-preferred metadata field shipped on an MCP server registry or Agent Registry surface to confirm the prediction's standardization landing.
